response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack and web engineer whose career centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and web GIS applications. While he has genuine geospatial interest through GISCollective and the Green Map project, these are built on web technologies rather than the native C++ or Rust stack this role demands. His C++ exposure is limited to a single short role at National Instruments in 2007–2008 and a bachelor thesis project involving audio synthesis — neither involves production routing pipelines, navigation tile generation, or geospatial data processing at scale. There is no Rust experience and no evidence of routing or navigation domain work.
strengths: Sustained geospatial domain interest with hands-on GIS platform development across GISCollective and Green Map
Real distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Broad systems background spanning Linux, embedded hardware, mobile, and multi-language environments
concerns: C++ experience is isolated to 2007–2008 and a thesis project; no Rust experience anywhere in the resume
No routing tile generation, navigation guidance, or map data pipeline work of any kind
Primary technical identity is TypeScript/Node.js full-stack, a significant mismatch with the C++-centric role
